action.reasoning: Observation: After 30 epochs, attention ResNet-LSTM reaches val exprate ~0.0193 (test 0.0092), loss ~0.49 with partial structure in preds (e.g. correct '2 6', approx sqrt/frac/x_ but symbol errors). Debug shows improving but low exact match. Analysis: Model learns basics; exposure bias, limited resolution (h=64), no aug, and greedy decode limit perf. Truncation fixed by full rewrite. Decision: Rewrite complete model.py (full MathExprRecognizer+fixed generate with per-sample EOS stop), full train.py (add albumentations aug for train, label_smoothing=0.1, target_h=80 for better res, weight_decay, complete best/last save+metrics logging, 50 epochs), update predict.py (map_location+strict load); run train+debug (expect ~25min) then submit_eval on best.pt for next baseline.
